title: Minority Homebuyer Grant Awareness
audience: Minority first-time homebuyers in Marion County
goal: Encourage viewers to check their eligibility for the grant
hook: There's a grant in Marion County that covers your down payment. Most people who qualify don't know it exists.

scenes.headline: There's a grant in Marion County that covers your down payment. Most people who qualify don't know it exists.
scenes.voiceover: There's a grant in Marion County that covers your down payment. Most people who qualify don't know it exists.

scenes.headline: Down payment feels out of reach
scenes.body: If you're a minority first-time homebuyer in Indianapolis, you might think homeownership is out of reach because of the down payment.
scenes.voiceover: If you're a minority first-time homebuyer in Indianapolis, you might think homeownership is out of reach because of the down payment.

scenes.headline: This grant changes everything
scenes.body: But here's the truth: this grant can make a home possible without upfront costs.
scenes.voiceover: But here's the truth: this grant can make a home possible without upfront costs.

scenes.headline: Real outcomes
scenes.body: Imagine moving into your own home without worrying about a huge down payment. It happens more often than you think.
scenes.voiceover: Imagine moving into your own home without worrying about a huge down payment. It happens more often than you think.

scenes.headline: Check your eligibility
scenes.cta_text: See if you qualify — it takes 2 minutes
scenes.voiceover: See if you qualify — it takes 2 minutes. Talk to a HUD-approved lender today.

voiceover_script: There's a grant in Marion County that covers your down payment. Most people who qualify don't know it exists. If you're a minority first-time homebuyer in Indianapolis, you might think homeownership is out of reach because of the down payment. But here's the truth: this grant can make a home possible without upfront costs. Imagine moving into your own home without worrying about a huge down payment. It happens more often than you think. See if you qualify — it takes 2 minutes. Talk to a HUD-approved lender today.
thumbnail_concept: Smiling couple holding keys to new home
caption: Minority homebuyers in Indy: Discover a grant for zero down payment. See if you qualify in 2 minutes!
